b:T72b8,<div class="specification">
<p>The table below summarizes the number and percentage of marine species worldwide with at least one documented record of becoming entangled and at least one record of ingesting marine debris, such as plastics and fishing nets.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: Küehn <em>et al</em>. 2015 (http://edepot.wur.nl/344861)]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Compare and contrast the information provided for baleen whales and sea turtles.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline how plastic ingestion may lead to biomagnification in these marine species.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Describe the use of indicator species in monitoring environmental change.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T6f9,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. both show cases of entanglement/ingestion ✔</p>
<p>b. sea turtles similar number of species affected by entanglement/ ingestion while baleen whales more species affected by entanglement than ingestion<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>higher percentage of sea turtles species affected by entanglement/ ingestion than baleen whales<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>higher number of species of «baleen» whales than species of sea turtles ✔</p>
<p><em>Do not accept answers quoting numerical values only</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. plastic broken down into microplastics to be able to enter the food chain ✔</p>
<p>b. plastic/microplastics become more concentrated at each trophic level ✔ </p>
<p><em>Accept descriptions of biomagnification involving any of the species in the table</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. presence/absence indicate environmental conditions ✔ <em>Accept named environmental condition/pollution</em>.</p>
<p>b. changes in the environment affect these species ✔ <em>Number of species or type of species</em>.</p>
<p>c. «relative» numbers of individuals/indicator species can be used to calculate a biotic index ✔</p>
<p>d. changes monitored over time ✔ <em>Accept example of time frame</em>.</p>
<p>e. changes can lead to measures to protect the environment ✔</p>
<p>f. example of an indicator species <em><strong>AND</strong></em> what it indicates «<em>e.g.</em> Tubifex for sediment pollution» ✔ <em>Award marks for a species, not a group</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/c/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","c"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.3.HL.TZ0.15"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","c-3-impacts-of-humans-on-ecosystems, c-4-conservation-of-biodiversity"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
